fdir.title: Low battery
fdir.response: Reduce non-essential loads, command CMD_EPS_PWR_OFF for low-priority channels

fdir.title: Battery management fault
fdir.response: Power cycle BMS via CMD_EPS_BATT_RESET, monitor TLM_EPS_BATT_V

fdir.title: Battery overtemperature
fdir.response: Disable charging via CMD_EPS_BATT_TRICKLE rate=0

fdir.title: EPS overvoltage
fdir.response: Isolate affected channel via CMD_EPS_PWR_OFF

fdir.title: ADCS in SAFE
fdir.response: Verify spacecraft state, command CMD_ADCS_MODE_SET to recover

fdir.title: Body rates exceed nominal
fdir.response: Engage detumble via CMD_ADCS_MODE_SET mode=DETUMBLE

fdir.title: Reaction wheel saturation
fdir.response: Fire magnetorquers via CMD_ADCS_MTQ_FIRE for momentum dump

fdir.title: Star tracker lost lock
fdir.response: Reissue CMD_ADCS_STAR_TRACK, verify TLM_ADCS_STAR_LOCK

fdir.title: Link degraded
fdir.response: Switch RF band via CMD_COMM_TX_ENABLE, increase power via CMD_COMM_TX_POWER

fdir.title: High BER
fdir.response: Reduce data rate, switch to redundant transmitter

fdir.title: CPU overload
fdir.response: Suspend non-essential tasks, dump task list

fdir.title: Memory low
fdir.response: Run cleanup, delete temp files via CMD_CDH_FILE_DELETE

fdir.title: Watchdog reset
fdir.response: Inspect TLM_CDH_BOOT_COUNT, dump memory via CMD_CDH_MEM_DUMP

fdir.title: Memory ECC error
fdir.response: Dump affected region, schedule CMD_CDH_MEM_PATCH if persistent

fdir.title: Thermal high
fdir.response: Engage radiator, reduce active loads

fdir.title: Thermal low
fdir.response: Enable heaters via CMD_THERMAL_HTR_ON

fdir.title: Detector hot
fdir.response: Suspend imaging, allow cooldown, monitor TLM_PAYLOAD_INST_TEMP

fdir.title: Instrument fault
fdir.response: Power cycle via CMD_PAYLOAD_INST_OFF then CMD_PAYLOAD_INST_ON

fdir.title: Buffer full
fdir.response: Initiate dump via CMD_COMM_DUMP_START

fdir.title: Tank overpressure
fdir.response: Vent via CMD_PROP_VALVE_OPEN, monitor TLM_PROP_TANK_P

fdir.title: Tank underpressure
fdir.response: Halt all burn planning, escalate to engineering

fdir.title: Propellant cold
fdir.response: Enable propellant heater via CMD_THERMAL_HTR_ON id=PROP

flight_rules.rule_text: Battery shall not be discharged below 22.0 V during eclipse
flight_rules.operator_action: Operator must verify SOC > 30% before entering eclipse

flight_rules.rule_text: Solar array deployment shall not be commanded while in eclipse
Reaction wheel commanded RPM shall not exceed +/- 5500
flight_rules.operator_action: Limit CMD_ADCS_RW_SPIN argument to within bounds

flight_rules.rule_text: ADCS mode transition to INERTIAL requires star tracker lock
flight_rules.operator_action: Verify TLM_ADCS_STAR_LOCK == LOCKED before CMD_ADCS_MODE_SET INERTIAL

flight_rules.rule_text: Transmitter shall not be enabled while ground station is below 5 deg elevation
Memory patches shall be uplinked only during contact passes with full uplink margin
flight_rules.operator_action: Operator must obtain second-operator concurrence for CMD_CDH_MEM_PATCH

flight_rules.rule_text: Battery heater shall remain on whenever battery temperature < 5 degC
flight_rules.operator_action: FDIR_THM_002 will autonomously enable; verify within 30s

flight_rules.rule_text: Imaging shall not be commanded while ADCS is in SAFE
Instrument shall not be powered on while detector temperature > 20 degC
Burns shall not be executed with tank pressure < 1000 kPa

flight_rules.operator_action: Two operators must both confirm before CMD_PROP_BURN_EXEC

flight_rules.rule_text: Propellant temperature shall remain above 5 degC at all times

procedures.title: EPS load shed
procedures.description: Drop non-essential loads to preserve battery during contingency

procedures.title: BMS recovery
procedures.description: Power-cycle the battery management system and verify telemetry

procedures.title: Battery thermal recovery
procedures.description: Reduce charging current and engage cooling pathway

procedures.title: EPS overvoltage isolation
procedures.description: Isolate the offending channel and inspect fault flags

procedures.title: ADCS SAFE recovery
procedures.description: High-level recovery wrapper: verify state, run detumble, return to NADIR

procedures.title: ADCS detumble
procedures.description: Execute detumble mode and verify body rates converge

procedures.title: Reaction wheel momentum dump
procedures.description: Use magnetorquers to bleed off accumulated wheel momentum

procedures.title: Star tracker reacquisition
procedures.description: Reissue tracking command and verify lock

procedures.title: Comm link recovery
procedures.description: Stepwise recovery: verify pointing, switch band, increase power

procedures.title: BER mitigation
procedures.description: Reduce data rate, fall back to redundant TX

procedures.title: CDH CPU recovery
procedures.description: Identify hung tasks and suspend non-essential workloads

procedures.title: CDH memory cleanup
procedures.description: Delete temporary files and dump usage report

procedures.title: Watchdog investigation
procedures.description: Manual checklist + dump memory regions for ground review

procedures.title: Memory ECC recovery
procedures.description: Dump affected region; if persistent, schedule patch

procedures.title: Thermal hot recovery
procedures.description: Reduce active loads and verify radiator pathway

procedures.title: Thermal cold recovery
procedures.description: Enable heaters and monitor return to nominal range

procedures.title: Payload thermal hold
procedures.description: Suspend imaging until detector cools

procedures.title: Payload recovery
procedures.description: Power-cycle instrument, run cal, verify nominal operation

procedures.title: Payload buffer dump
procedures.description: Initiate dump of stored imagery during next contact

procedures.title: Propellant tank vent
procedures.description: Controlled venting with operator concurrence

procedures.title: Low pressure hold
procedures.description: Halt burn planning, escalate to engineering review

procedures.title: Propellant thermal
procedures.description: Enable propellant heater zone and verify warming trend
